title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HP India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at HP India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? HP India Advisory Limited in Mumbai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About HP India Advisory Limited:
HP India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in REST APIs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HP India Advisory Limited!
